infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KazeTune needs access to your photo library so you can add a picture to your pins, playlists, and profile.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KazeTune uses the camera if you want to snap a fresh photo for a pin, playlist cover, or profile picture.

plugins.photosPermission: KazeTune needs access to your photo library so you can add a picture to your pins, playlists, and profile.
plugins.cameraPermission: KazeTune uses the camera if you want to snap a fresh photo for a pin, playlist cover, or profile picture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: KazeTune needs your location even in the background so it can play a pinned song clip when you walk past it.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: KazeTune needs your location to detect when you walk past a pin.
